title: ctenopteris tunguraguae
intro: Ctenopteris tunguraguae is a type of fern native to the tropical regions of the Americas, specifically in the Andes mountains, and is often referred to as the 'Andean shield fern'. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ctenopteris tunguraguae include reducing pain and inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by applying a topical solution to affected areas.
